description: Genuine human site usage, derived from Caddy access logs. A 'human page view' = a text/html response with status<400, from a non-bot User-Agent and a non-datacenter IP. Bots/scrapers/probes (incl. UA-spoofing scrapers from cloud IP ranges, and 4xx vuln-probes) are excluded. The site is fronted by Cloudflare, so real visitor IP comes from the Cf-Connecting-Ip header and country from Cf-Ipcountry. Tune the bot_ua / dc_ip variables at the top as you spot new offenders in the 'Top visitor IPs' panel.

list.name: bot_ua
list.label: Bot UA regex (excluded)
list.description: Case-insensitive RE2, fully anchored — keep the leading/trailing .* . Matches declared crawlers and scripted clients.

list.name: dc_ip
list.label: Datacenter IP regex (excluded)
list.description: Fully anchored RE2 — keep the trailing .* . Excludes AWS/GCP/Azure ranges where 'human' UAs are really scrapers. Extend with prefixes you see in the Top visitor IPs panel.

title: ClashRoyale — Site Usage

panels.title: Genuine human page views (range)
panels.description: text/html responses, status<400, non-bot UA, non-datacenter IP. The closest proxy to 'a person loaded a page'.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]`, ua=`request.headers["User-Agent"][0]`, vip=`request.headers["Cf-Connecting-Ip"][0]`, country=`request.headers["Cf-Ipcountry"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` | status<400 | ua!~`$bot_ua` | vip!~`$dc_ip` [$__range]))

panels.title: Unique human visitors (range)
panels.description: Distinct Cf-Connecting-Ip among genuine human page views. Approximate (no cookies) but privacy-friendly.

targets.expr: count(sum by (vip) (count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]`, ua=`request.headers["User-Agent"][0]`, vip=`request.headers["Cf-Connecting-Ip"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` | status<400 | ua!~`$bot_ua` | vip!~`$dc_ip` [$__range])))

panels.title: Bots / scrapers / probes (HTML, range)
panels.description: All HTML loads minus genuine human views = crawlers + UA-spoofing scrapers + 4xx vuln-probes.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` [$__range])) - sum(count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]`, ua=`request.headers["User-Agent"][0]`, vip=`request.headers["Cf-Connecting-Ip"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` | status<400 | ua!~`$bot_ua` | vip!~`$dc_ip` [$__range]))

panels.title: Total HTML loads (range)
panels.description: Every text/html response Caddy served — humans + bots — for context.

panels.title: Genuine human page views over time

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]`, ua=`request.headers["User-Agent"][0]`, vip=`request.headers["Cf-Connecting-Ip"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` | status<400 | ua!~`$bot_ua` | vip!~`$dc_ip` [$__interval]))

sum(count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]`, ua=`request.headers["User-Agent"][0]`, vip=`request.headers["Cf-Connecting-Ip"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` | status<400 | ua!~`$bot_ua` | vip!~`$dc_ip` [$__interval]))

sum(count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` [$__interval])) - sum(count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]`, ua=`request.headers["User-Agent"][0]`, vip=`request.headers["Cf-Connecting-Ip"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` | status<400 | ua!~`$bot_ua` | vip!~`$dc_ip` [$__interval]))

panels.title: Genuine views by country (range)
panels.description: Country from Cloudflare's Cf-Ipcountry header — no GeoIP lookup needed.

targets.expr: sum by (country) (count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]`, ua=`request.headers["User-Agent"][0]`, vip=`request.headers["Cf-Connecting-Ip"][0]`, country=`request.headers["Cf-Ipcountry"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` | status<400 | ua!~`$bot_ua` | vip!~`$dc_ip` [$__range]))

topk(20, sum by (request_uri) (count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]`, ua=`request.headers["User-Agent"][0]`, vip=`request.headers["Cf-Connecting-Ip"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` | status<400 | ua!~`$bot_ua` | vip!~`$dc_ip` [$__range])))

panels.title: Top visitor IPs — non-bot HTML (extend dc_ip with cloud IPs seen here)
panels.description: Deliberately does NOT apply the dc_ip filter, so datacenter scrapers stay visible. When you see a cloud IP hammering pages, add its prefix to the dc_ip variable.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (vip, country, status) (count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]`, ua=`request.headers["User-Agent"][0]`, vip=`request.headers["Cf-Connecting-Ip"][0]`, country=`request.headers["Cf-Ipcountry"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` | ua!~`$bot_ua` [$__range])))

topk(15, sum by (ua) (count_over_time({job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]`, ua=`request.headers["User-Agent"][0]`, vip=`request.headers["Cf-Connecting-Ip"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` | status<400 | ua!~`$bot_ua` | vip!~`$dc_ip` [$__range])))

{job="caddy"} | json | json ct=`resp_headers["Content-Type"][0]`, ua=`request.headers["User-Agent"][0]`, vip=`request.headers["Cf-Connecting-Ip"][0]`, country=`request.headers["Cf-Ipcountry"][0]` | ct=~`text/html.*` | status<400 | ua!~`$bot_ua` | vip!~`$dc_ip` | line_format `{{.request_method}} {{.request_uri}}  <-  {{.country}} {{.vip}}  [{{.ua}}]`
